message:
fix(connectors): make Anthropic API version configurable, gate GCP service_account mode

Anthropic: add resolve_api_version() with hierarchy: config override >
FCP_ANTHROPIC_API_VERSION env var > compiled default (2023-06-01). Added
api_version field to AnthropicClient. 286 tests pass.

GCP: bearer_token() now returns Result, rejecting service_account mode
with GcpError::Config (JWT signing not implemented — would leak raw
private key as Bearer token). GcpClient::new() also rejects at
construction time. All authenticate_request callers use match/Terminal
pattern. 92 tests pass.

Close beads: 991m3 (Anthropic), weh1v (GCP)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
